message.content:
@startuml
title OAuth2 Authorization Code Grant Workflow with SAML2 Post Binding for user provisioning

package "HealthSphere" {
  participant "Apigee Edge" as apigee
  participant "Orion Health Platform" as orion
}

participant "HealthCloud" as healthcloud
participant "Embedded Browser" as browser

healthcloud -> browser: GET /authorize?response_type=code
browser --> healthcloud: 302 https://<redirect_url> (SAML OR token)

activate browser
SAML Authentication
  browser -> apigee: POST /oauth2/saml
  activate apigee
  apigee -> orion: POST /login-auth/saml?path=/actor/current
  activate orion
  orion --> orion: Verify SAMLResponse
  deactivate orion
  orion --> apigee: Generate authorization code
  deactivate apigee
  apigee --> browser: 302 https://<redirect_url>?code=<code>
  deactivate browser
end SAML Authentication

healthcloud -> apigee: POST /token?code=<code>
activate apigee
apigee --> healthcloud: 200 access_token + refresh_token
deactivate apigee

@enduml
